title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 20%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Getting more people into work is a long-term project – it won’t suddenly fund higher defence spending (as Burnham suggests). 

Real choices are: raise taxes on most people/raise borrowing/cut spending.
items.content_text:
Getting more people into work is a long-term project – it won’t suddenly fund higher defence spending (as Burnham suggests). 

Real choices are: raise taxes on most people/raise borrowing/cut spending.
